brand_identity.description: An AI PC Optimization Advisor and Build Generator tailored for PC Gamers, Streamers, and hardware enthusiasts. Uses a high-tech performance aesthetic heavily grounded in deep void blacks with sharp, aggressive accents of Cyber Yellow (Volt) and Matrix Green. The interface feels like a premium command center or tactical HUD.

typography.notes: Do not exceed text-6xl for H1. Always use Unbounded for headings with tight tracking to give a solid, premium tech feel. JetBrains Mono is strictly for all body text, prices, hardware specs, and data tables to evoke a terminal/diagnostic aesthetic.

colors.notes: Use the Tinted Grey rule: no pure gray. All surfaces are tinted slightly towards Indigo/Obsidian. Primary CTA (Cyber Yellow) is used sparingly—only for main actions like 'Optimize PC' or 'Save Build'. Use Laser Green specifically for Price Drops/Healthy metrics, and Alert Red for Price Spikes.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid for dashboard (dense, gap-6). Bento layout for Build Generators.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Generous padding inside cards (p-6 to p-8). Mobile-first responsive grids.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and tables. Only center-align empty states or main hero CTA.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-sm max). No pill-shaped buttons unless explicitly required by a switch component.

surfaces_and_effects.headers_and_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). Sticky top.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat background (#0F0F12), 1px subtle border (#2A2A35). On hover: border glows slightly and subtle Y-translation.
surfaces_and_effects.price_tracker: Grid Borders styling. Expose the skeleton with right and bottom borders for grid items.

components.buttons: Sharp corners. Cyber Yellow background with Deep Black text for primary. Subtle hover states.
components.inputs: Shadcn highly customized. Flat black background, visible bottom border, focus state highlights with Cyber Yellow.
components.charts: Use Recharts customized with Matrix Green (#00FF66) for price drops and Alert Red (#FF3B30) for price increases. Dark grid lines (#2A2A35).
components.tables: Dense, monospace font for all numbers/prices. Left-aligned product names, right-aligned prices.

animations.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift border color and slight text color shift. Avoid heavy background color shifts.
animations.ai_typing: Terminal-style rapid typing reveal for AI advice.

hero_build.description: Vibrant RGB lighting on modern computer hardware. Use as the Hero background with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/70) or gradient mask to ensure text contrast.

ai_pattern.description: Dynamic abstract photograph of blue light patterns. Use inside the AI Chat window or as a subtle structural background under the Build Generator.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='optimize-pc-btn', data-testid='price-tracker-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build with React/Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
Integrate Shadcn UI but aggressively override the default light-theme aesthetic to match the dark Obsidian/Cyber Yellow palette.
Ensure 'JetBrains Mono' is loaded and applied correctly to numeric data (prices, specs, tracking URLs).
Ensure 'Unbounded' is used for headings with tight tracking.
Use the media URLs provided; DO NOT use placeholders.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
Build the AI PC Optimization Advisor as a chat-like interface.
Build the Product Tracker with clear visual indicators (Green/Red) for price changes.
Create a comprehensive Dashboard layout using the 'Control Room' grid.
